sentences.arabic: كَانَتْ بِنْتٌ اسْمُهَا لُجَيْنُ تُحِبُّ الرَّسْمَ.
sentences.translation: Bila je djevojčica po imenu Ludžejn koja je voljela crtanje.
sentences.translationEn: There was a girl named Lujain who loved drawing.

sentences.translation: Nacrtala je sliku neba, stabla i rijeke.
sentences.translationEn: She drew a picture of the sky, trees, and river.

sentences.arabic: أَرَتِ الصُّورَةَ لِمُعَلِّمَتِهَا فَأُعْجِبَتْ بِهَا كَثِيرًا.
sentences.translation: Pokazala je sliku učiteljici koja joj se jako svidjela.
sentences.translationEn: She showed the picture to her teacher who admired it very much.

sentences.arabic: عُلِّقَتِ الصُّورَةُ عَلَى جِدَارِ الْفَصْلِ وَفَرِحَتْ لُجَيْنُ.
sentences.translation: Slika je okačena na zid učionice i Ludžejn se obradovala.
sentences.translationEn: The picture was hung on the classroom wall and Lujain was happy.
